excerpts.excerpt:
EVELYN
Of course. Just not now. Let him
enjoy his party tonight.
JOY
You think Becky is going to make it
through the entire party without
introducing herself to Gong Gong?
Have you met Becky?
EVELYN
(taken aback)
我以為她要上班。
EVELYN
(taken aback)
I thought she had work.
JOY
She got someone to cover for her.
Is that... not okay?
RICK
Evelyyyyyn! My belle! Guess whose
20 got eaten by the machine again.
It's RICK, a chipper older white regular, who comes in a
little too regularly.

JOY
Gong Gong, hello. How was
your trip?
GONG GONG
哇，乜佢D唐話越來越差啊。
(In Cantonese
GONG GONG
Wah, her Chinese is getting
worse every time we talk.
Evelyn eyes Becky who is slowly approaching Gong Gong. Joy
watches Evelyn watch Becky. Joy tests the water.
JOY
公公… 這是 Becky. Becky
她是我的 How do you say it
again... shit, I mean, crap.
她是我的
JOY
Gong Gong... this is Becky.
Becky is my... How do you say
it again... shit, I mean,
crap. She is my...
Gong Gong begins to stare at Becky. Evelyn interrupts.

INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR OFFICE - PRESENT UNIVERSE24
EVELYN
Like the Janitor’s closet... Like
you right now.
ALPHA WAYMOND
Exactly. It's called Verse Jumping.
I need you to pay attention because
you need to learn how to do it,
right now.
EVELYN
Right now?
ALPHA WAYMOND
It may be our only chance of
getting out of here alive.
Evelyn is suddenly overcome with nausea.
Alpha Waymond finds a piece of chewed up gum stuck under the
desk and pops it in his mouth before pressing his bluetooth.
This doesn’t help Evelyn’s nausea.
ALPHA WAYMOND (CONT'D)
(spitting out gum)
Two guards coming this way. On my
signal, try to blend in.

EVELYN
Get out of the way!
(to Deirdre)
I love you! I love you!
Her bluetooth turns YELLOW. Evelyn grabs Waymond’s hand and
they run down the stairs as Deirdre laughs.
Evelyn turns to see Deirdre leap off the top step and
straight into the air right towards her. Evelyn falls on her
knees and finally gives in.
EVELYN (CONT'D)
(like a prayer)
I LOVE YOU!
The bluetooth turns GREEN. She presses the button.
A shock goes through her brain. Just as Deirdre’s knee is
about to hit Evelyn’s nose, TIME SLOWS DOWN TO A CRAWL.
The camera patiently pushes into Evelyn’s head, through
countless universes then stops:
MOVIE STAR UNIVERSE: INT. LIMOUSINE48
Evelyn lounges in her limo dressed in a lovely gown. She
gasps as she rapidly downloads memories.
WE GO THROUGH MEMORIES LIKE A TRAIN GOING THROUGH A TUNNEL:
- EXT. HONG KONG ALLEY - 1980s - Evelyn and Waymond, in their 48-1
early 20’s, on the porch.

Deirdre sighs and wipes a tear with a hot dog finger.
DEIRDRE
Oh honey, isn't it beautiful?
Evelyn looks down at her own hot dog hands and shrieks.
ALPHAVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV CONTROL ROOM63
ALPHA OFFICER #1
She appears to be in a universe
where everyone has hot dogs instead
of fingers.
ALPHA OFFICER #2
An evolutionary branch in the
anatomy of the human race?
EXT. ROCKY DESERT (ALA 2001 A SPACE ODYSSEY)64
A monkey with hot dog fingers murders a normal fingered
monkey with her hot dogs. Other monkeys whoop and scream.
OFFICER #2 (VO)
A jump like that would fry most
people.
ALPHA WAYMOND (VO)
Like I said, she's not most people.
The normal fingered monkey’s outstretched hand falls limp
(but still has bones).

Evelyn looks back at Joy.
EVELYN
You won't.
She swipes up a piece of snot from Alpha Gong Gong’s face and
brings it towards her lips. Everyone gags. GREEN.
Evelyn falls down against the desk behind her. She looks
around confused.
ALPHA GONG GONG
Where’d she jump?
JANITOR UNIVERSE: INT. IRS BUILDING - EXECUTIVE OFFICE72
In the same spot, Evelyn wears a custodian’s outfit and holds
a duster.
A button underneath the desk blinks red. A secret bookshelf
door swings open revealing a panic room. The District Manager
comes out - sweaty, & red followed by his DOMINATRIX.
DISTRICT MANAGER
Clean up in there. It’s gunna need
extra work today.
He throws Evelyn a twenty dollar bill with a shushing gesture
and walks out.
Janitor Evelyn pops open the cap of a bottle of fancy whiskey
and hocks a loogie into it. She smiles.

Jobu seems oddly excited.
The door swings open, it’s Waymond. Evelyn plays it cool.
WAYMOND
喔〜 Evelyn# 你還在這裏幹什麽？
WAYMOND
Oh. Evelyn, what are you
still doing here?
EVELYN
We're just... practicing for
karaoke.
WAYMOND
你不是去送⽂件了嗎？
WAYMOND (CONT'D)
I thought you were going to drop
off our paperwork-
EVELYN
別擔⼼。
(he starts to object)
I said, I'll take care of it!
EVELYN
Don't worry about that.
(he starts to object)
I said, I'll take care of it!
With one last sad look, Waymond leaves.

She pulls Deirdre in for a hug. Deirdre resists.
EVELYN (CONT'D)
And in a universe where we both
agree that no one could love you,
if we look hard enough, something
will prove us wrong.
(hugs deeper)
We are wrong.
DEIRDRE (BAGEL)
Stop this. Stop this now.
HOT DOG UNIVERSE: Evelyn is hugging Hot Dog Deirdre. Deirdre 107-1
drops her suitcase and fully lets go into the hug.
TAXES UNIVERSE: Evelyn is hugging Deirdre who is clearly 107
uncomfortable, trying not to reveal that she is moved.
BACK IN THE IRS: Deirdre begins to break down. Her fellow 107-3
Bagel Followers whisper.
DEIRDRE (BAGEL) (CONT'D)
I feel nothing! Decree 46, I mean
47. What’s the decree? I feel...
HOT DOG UNIVERSE: Using her toes, Evelyn unbuttons Deirdre’s 107-1
shirt then slaps her thighs. She is beginning the mating
ritual. Deirdre is over the moon.

INT. JAIL: They charge each other and right as they hit each 118-1f
other-
EXT. BACKYARD: They are swinging piñatas again. 118-1g
JOBU (CONT'D)
-or we tie. Or we eat crepes.
A hand grabs Evelyn Pinata’s head.
MOVIE STAR UNIVERSE: EXT. HONG KONG ALLEY - Jobu holds Evelyn 118-1h
by the head and pushes her down into the path of an oncoming
car-
JOBU (CONT'D)
Cause all of it’s a pointless
swirling bucket of bullshit.
ACTION UNIVERSE: INT. IRS - Jobu is holding Evelyn's head 118-1i
inches from the Bagel.
JOBU (CONT'D)
That bagel is where we finally find
peace Evelyn.
EVELYN
Stop calling me Evelyn!
Evelyn flexes her pinky then flicks Jobu’s hand away-
VARIOUS UNIVERSES: Evelyn blocks Jobu’s blows turning them 118-1j
into a hug.
